title: aster × hybridus
intro: Aster × hybridus, also known as New England aster, is a hybrid perennial plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family, derived from the cross between two species of wild asters. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Aster × hybridus include reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Aster × hybridus typically involve drying the flowers and leaves, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
